title: taraxacum sellandii
intro: Taraxacum sellandii, also known as the lesser dandelion or Irish dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and high blood pressure. The health benefits of Taraxacum sellandii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum sellandii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of uses and applications in traditional medicine.
